name: ASUS TUF GAMING Z790-PRO WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7800+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5 GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 6E
